steps.title: Make two quick data rows
steps.content: The phrase "$53$ more than twice $x$" means start with twice $x$, then add $53$. Twice $x$ is $2x$, so the expression is $2x+53$.

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content: Because $y$ is equal to that expression, the equation is $$y=2x+53.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The remaining alternative uses the wrong slope. $y=2x+53$ is correct.
